typePicker.title: What type of QR code do you want to create?
typePicker.subtitle: Pick a type: the form adapts automatically.

builder.dynamicHint: Editable anytime without reprinting, with scan analytics.
builder.staticHint: Content encoded directly: no analytics and no editing.
builder.staticWarning: Static QR: if you change the content, the QR code changes and must be reprinted.
builder.expiresHint: After this date, the QR shows an “expired” page.
builder.passwordHint: Visitors will need this password to access the content.
builder.passwordSet: A password is set. Leave empty to keep it, type a new one to replace it.
builder.qrLimitReached: QR code limit reached for your plan ({limit}).
builder.dynamicLimitReached: Dynamic QR limit reached for your plan ({limit}).

form.uploadError: File upload failed. Please try again.
form.storageQuota: Your plan's storage quota is reached ({limit} MB). Delete some files or upgrade.
form.videoLocked: Video hosting is available on a higher plan.
form.authError: Your session has expired. Please sign in again to upload a file.

customize.logoLocked: Adding a logo requires the Pro plan.

download.title: Download
download.locked: Format available on a higher plan

list.title: My QR codes
list.subtitle: {count, plural, =0 {No QR codes} one {# QR code} other {# QR codes}}
list.empty: You don't have any QR codes yet.
list.confirmBulkDelete: {count, plural, one {Delete this QR code?} other {Delete these # QR codes?}} This cannot be undone.

folders.title: Folders
folders.subtitle: Organize your QR codes into folders.
folders.qrCount: {count, plural, =0 {No QR codes} one {# QR code} other {# QR codes}}
folders.locked: Folders are available on a higher plan.
folders.confirmDelete: The QR codes inside this folder will not be deleted.

detail.notScannable: Content encoded directly in the QR
detail.createdBanner: QR code created successfully! Download it below.
